Citizens are denied the right to life/rehabilitation for this crime because their education is assumed to have made them 'incurable' if they still choose to offend.

verbatim: [§312] So if anyone convict in a court of law either a resident alien or a slave of stealing any piece of public property, in his case, since he is probably curable, the court shall decide what punishment he shall suffer or what fine he shall pay.
